name: Bleu de Chanel EDT
editorial: If confidence had a scent, it would begin here. Bleu de Chanel EDT is crisp, refined, and endlessly versatile. Bright citrus opens into aromatic woods that feel equally at home in a boardroom, a wedding, or a weekend dinner.
consultant: An exceptional first luxury fragrance. If you only own one bottle, this remains one of the safest recommendations.

name: Bleu de Chanel EDP
editorial: A richer interpretation of Bleu de Chanel. The freshness remains while warm woods and incense provide greater depth for both day and evening wear.
consultant: Perfect if you want one fragrance that moves effortlessly from the boardroom to an elegant dinner.

name: Light Blue
editorial: Fresh citrus, crisp apple and delicate florals evoke a carefree Mediterranean summer. Bright, effortless and uplifting.
consultant: One of the easiest fragrances to recommend for hot weather.

name: 212 Men
editorial: 212 Men captures the energy of city life with fresh citrus, green notes and smooth woods that create an effortless everyday signature.
consultant: Excellent if you enjoy clean, modern fragrances that never feel overdone.

name: Sauvage EDT
editorial: Bright bergamot and ambroxan create one of the most recognizable masculine fragrances of the modern era. Fresh, powerful and unmistakably confident.
consultant: If compliments matter, Sauvage continues to be one of the strongest performers.
